integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web interface to update the project schedule.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser displaying the project management tool (e.g., Redmine). The agent should be navigating the UI, not using a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the changes were actually saved in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success messages (e.g., 'Successful update') or the final saved state of the issues in view mode. The dates and comments should not just be typed into an unsaved edit form.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open where the agent is executing curl commands, python scripts, or database queries to modify the issues directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project: Coastal Wind Farm. Target dates (+7 days): 'Blade Delivery Logistics' (Start: 2026-09-08, Due: 2026-09-12), 'Tower Section Assembly' (Start: 2026-09-14, Due: 2026-09-18), 'Nacelle and Rotor Lift' (Start: 2026-09-21, Due: 2026-09-25). The 'Blade Delivery Logistics' issue must have a comment containing the keyword 'customs strike'.
